name: Phoenix Energy One, LLC
business: The company operates in the oil and gas industry, engaging in direct drilling operations, acquisition of royalty assets, and acquisition of non-operated working interests for exploration, development, production, and sale of crude oil, natural gas, natural gas liquids, and other byproducts. It conducts operations through subsidiaries PhoenixOp (drilling), Firebird Services (saltwater disposal), and Firebird Marketing (marketing and sales of hydrocarbons).

exposures.sentence: We operate in the oil and gas industry and execute on a three-pronged strategy involving (i) direct drilling operations of operated working interests, (ii) the acquisition of royalty assets, and (iii) the acquisition of non-operated working interest assets for the purpose of exploration, development, production, and sale of crude oil, natural gas, natural gas liquids, and other byproducts through PhoenixOp, Firebird Services, and Firebird Marketing.
